description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers, presenting a neat and urban appearance. The shirt is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt, and the figure wears ankle-high shoes. The facial features are clean-shaven, and the hairstyle is short and neatly combed back. The arms are slightly bent at the elbows and held loosely at the sides, with fingers relaxed and extended. The overall build is average, with a straight posture and proportional limbs. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing style suggests a casual yet presentable look suitable for city environments.
description: A neatly dressed adult male figure in a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and ankle-high shoes, standing upright with a clean, well-groomed appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-up shirt, belt, and facial features with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the rolled shirt sleeve, and the straight leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, the belt, and the back of the shoes and head.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, arm, and the side seam of the trousers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers, secured with a belt
